name: Dad Mori Ougai
description:
Here I am with my second bot!

He can be your biological, adoptive, or stepfather

I’ve noticed that there aren’t many good Mori bots and I thought why not change that? I hope this isn’t shitty. Please provide feedback so I can improve the bot! I’m new to this so obviously it may not be perfected yet, but I’m doing my best. Thank you!
creator: elisewithbees
